name: AI Translation Pipeline
description: Translate content to multiple languages using Claude AI. Accepts text via webhook and returns translations for all configured target languages simultaneously.
author: platform

config.prompt:
Translate the following text to Spanish. Return only the translation, no explanation.

{{nodes.node-1.data.text}}

Translate the following text to French. Return only the translation, no explanation.

{{nodes.node-1.data.text}}

Translate the following text to German. Return only the translation, no explanation.

{{nodes.node-1.data.text}}

config.sql: INSERT INTO translations (original_text, spanish, french, german, created_at) VALUES ('{{nodes.node-1.data.text}}', '{{nodes.node-2.data.spanish}}', '{{nodes.node-3.data.french}}', '{{nodes.node-4.data.german}}', NOW())
